pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh explicitly define this notebook path.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly define this output CSV path.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly define this output plot path.
Task description, setup_task.sh, and install_urbansim.sh confirm the location of the sanfran_public.h5 file.
Task description explicitly specifies these exact column names for the output CSV.
Task description explicitly requests a CSV of the top 100 most feasible parcels.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real-world San Francisco dataset (sanfran_public.h5) compiled by UDST. The agent must calculate the FAR (floor area ratio) using the provided shape_area and building_sqft, map parcels to their zoning constraints (using 'zoning_for_parcels' when needed), and calculate unused capacity. Expected outputs include an executed Jupyter notebook, a feasibility distribution plot, and a CSV of exactly the top 100 most feasible parcels containing the expected column headers (parcel_id, current_density, max_allowed, unused_capacity_ratio).
